NEW_TOURNAMENT_DESCRIPTION: Creates a new tournament. IMPORTANT! Current settings will be lost.
START_TOURNAMENT_DESCRIPTION: When the tournament starts, a tournament schedule is created in which players are randomly paired against each other in the first round. IMPORTANT! Changes to the settings are no longer possible after starting the tournament.
FINISH_ROUND_TITLE: Finish current round and start next round
FINISH_ROUND_DESCRIPTION: IMPORTANT! Changes to the current round are no longer possible after finishing the round
MATCH_INPUT_ERRORS: This match has the following input errors:

TIP.LEG_INPUT_CONTENT_2: Type the points left for the loser

ERROR_MESSAGE.MIN_PLAYERS: The minimum amount of players is 4
ERROR_MESSAGE.MAX_PLAYERS: The maximum amount of players is 128
ERROR_MESSAGE.EMPTY_PLAYER_NAME: Player name must not be empty
ERROR_MESSAGE.REMAINING_POINTS_RANGE: The remaining points should not be greater than the chosen game allows
ERROR_MESSAGE.INVALID_LEG: The winner of the leg must have 0 remaining points the loser a value greater than 0
